Experience foreign language YouTube videos in your native language

Overcome the language barrier with "AI Voice Over for YouTube" and unlock content from videos in 57 languages!

With our AI-powered voice-over technology, spoken content from lectures, documentaries, tutorials, lectures, or news broadcasts is translated and the original audio is dubbed in your language.

Expand your knowledge and discover content from countries and regions whose languages are foreign to you. Our AI-based add-on is here to enrich your YouTube experience.

Download our add-on and explore TED Talks in languages you understand effortlessly or want to hear for free.

To unlock translation for all YouTube videos, you can purchase tokens through a subscription. These tokens can then be used according to the computational cost of a video. For 4 euros, 120 tokens are credited monthly, which corresponds to a translation duration of about 2 - 2 1/2 hours.

Thank you for using "AI Voice Over for YouTube"!

We value your experience and welcome your feedback to continuously improve our tool. Share your thoughts with us and be part of our journey towards better language accessibility on YouTube.

Email: ai.voiceover.yt@gmail.com

Free All-in-One SEO and Website Traffic Analysis Tool by AnalyzeSphere
All-in-one Chrome extension for SEO, traffic, and competitive analysis. Perfect for marketers and SEO pros.

Whether you're doing SEO research, checking out competitors, or just curious about a site’s performance, this extension has got you covered.  

Here’s what you’ll get:  
1. Traffic Insights
- Traffic Data: See the last 3 months of traffic stats, including bounce rate, pages per visit, and average visit duration.  

- Traffic Sources: Find out where the traffic is coming from—direct, search, social, or referrals.  

- Traffic by Country: Discover which countries are driving the most visits.  

- Ranking & Keywords: Get the site’s ranking, top keywords, search volume, estimated CPC, and how much traffic those keywords are bringing in.  

2. SEO Analysis 
- Overview: Check title and description length, canonical tags, noindex tags, X-Robots headers, and robots.txt blocking rules.  

- Primary & Suggested Keywords: Automatically detect the main keywords on the page, see where they appear (title, meta, headings, URL, content), and get suggested keywords with search volume, CPC, and competition level.  

- Headings: Quickly scan all H1-H6 tags on the page.  

- Domain Info: View indexed pages, domain age, status, name servers, SSL security, and registrar details.  

- Density Check: Analyze keyword density for 1-5 word phrases.  

- Images: Get all image URLs, alt texts, and previews.  

- Hreflangs: Check language-specific URLs and their status codes.  

- Structured Data: Review Schema.org, Open Graph, and Twitter Card markup.  

- Links: See all links on the page, their anchors, and whether they’re follow/no-follow.  

3. Product & Market Analysis 
- Product Intro: Get a quick overview of the site/product, including target users, pain points, solutions, business model, and market positioning.  

- FAB Analysis: Break down the product’s features, advantages, and benefits.  

- Target Audience: Detailed audience breakdown with reasoning.  

- Purchase Intent: Rank the audience by purchase intent and understand why.  

- Sentiment Analysis: See what users are saying—positive and negative feedback based on online searches.  

- Marketing Insights: Discover the marketing channels being used, industry trends, user touchpoints, and purchase paths.  

- Competitors: Identify main competitors, analyze their strengths and weaknesses, and understand the product’s differentiation strategy.  

- SWOT Analysis: Get a clear SWOT breakdown for the product.

无需 Flomo 会员，也可在任意网页上保存 flomo 笔记

flomo 插件，可以使用该插件保存 flomo 笔记，并且自动同步到已经登录的 flomo 账号上，你可以在任意安装该插件的浏览器页面上使用

官网：https://flomo-extension-pages.hotstrips.org

新功能：
0. 支持选中文本暂存到 flomo-extension 草稿

1.  支持未保存的笔记临时保存为草稿

2. 支持和 flomo 网页端一致的格式编辑，包括加粗、下划线、无序列表、有序列表、背景色标记

3. 优化提示信息，修复编辑器菜单 bug

4. 支持 Google 账号注册和登录

5. 优化使用说明提示


用户可以享受到以下几个方面的优化体验：

1. 即时记录：在浏览网页过程中，无论何时灵感迸发或需要记录重要信息，用户都可以通过 Flomo 插件迅速创建笔记。

2. 自动同步：笔记一旦创建，插件会自动将其同步到用户已登录的 Flomo 账户，确保笔记内容的实时更新和备份。

3. 安全性：由于笔记内容会直接同步到 Flomo 服务器，用户不必担心本地数据的安全性问题。
Get instant product insights and answers to your shopping questions

BuyScout® Browser Extension brings an AI shopping assistant right to the pages you shop on. Instead of sifting through endless reviews or specs, you can simply ask questions in plain language—like whether two items are comparable, if a feature is worth it, or what people love and hate about a product—and get clear, instant answers. It’s like having a knowledgeable friend by your side, cutting through confusion and turning overwhelming product info into simple, actionable insights.

✨ Key Features:
• 📖 AI Product Insights – Instantly see the real pros and cons of any product, intelligently summarized from thousands of reviews across the web.

• 💬 Personalized Recommendations & Smart Q&A – Ask BuyScout® anything in natural language and receive tailored product suggestions, explanations, and shopping guidance based on your needs, preferences, and budget.

• 🔄 In-Depth Product Comparisons – Compare multiple products side-by-side in seconds and instantly understand the key differences that matter most.

• 💰 Lowest Price & Deals Finder – Discover the best available prices across stores, track price history, and receive alerts when prices drop.

• 🛍️ Cross-Store Shopping Assistant – Enjoy one seamless AI shopping experience that works across supported retailers, helping you make confident decisions wherever you shop.

• 🔒 Privacy & Data Protection – Your data is securely protected and never shared outside of BuyScout®.

🏁 Getting Started is Easy:
1. Click the 'Add to Chrome' button and pin it to the toolbar.
2. Sign up for a BuyScout® account.
3. Visit any product details page on one of our supported retailers (e.g., amazon.com) and click on the BuyScout® icon.
4. View product insights or ask BuyScout® a question!

✉️ Contact Us:
If you have any questions or suggestions, please visit our support page or contact us at contact@netprism.com.

📄 Terms & Privacy:
We may use affiliate links to support ongoing development. By using BuyScout®, you agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.

Thank you for choosing BuyScout®!

Monitors a student's browsing data and keeps them on task.

VCS Surelock is the Chromebook monitoring solution designed for Vancouver Christian School (https://vancs.org). Surelock helps teachers see the browsing activity of a student easily and securely.

Surelock's features are:

1. Seeing a student's full browsing history for the entire school year across all devices
2. Seeing a student's browsing activity in realtime
3. Running commands on a student's device in realtime such as:
       a. Opening, closing, and switching tabs
       b. Sending messages to the student's device
       c. Sending spoken messages to the student's device
       c. Locking the student's device
       d. Setting a tab limit for the student's device
       e. Creating quizzes/tests for the student (prevents student from using computer 
            until quiz/test ends)

These features make it easy for a teacher to protect students as they browse the web and it gives the teacher full control over the student's internet usage.
Automatically explore data, generate visualizations and infographics from Spreadsheets using large language models like AI.

AI Spreadsheets Visualization is a tool for generating data visualizations and data-faithful infographics. It work with any programming language and visualization libraries e.g. matplotlib, seaborn, altair, d3 etc and works with multiple large language model providers (PaLM, Cohere, Huggingface). 

It comprises of 4 modules - A SUMMARIZER that converts data into a rich but compact natural language summary, a GOAL EXPLORER that enumerates visualization goals given the data, a VISGENERATOR that generates, refines, executes and filters visualization code and an INFOGRAPHER module that yields data-faithful stylized graphics using IGMs. 

AI Spreadsheets Visualization leverages the language modeling and code writing capabilities of state-of-the-art LLMs in enabling core automated visualization capabilities (data summarization, goal exploration, visualization generation, infographics generation) as well as operations on existing visualizations (visualization explanation, self-evaluation, automatic repair, recommendation).

 Data Summarization
 Goal Generation
 Visualization Generation
 Visualization Editing
 Visualization Explanation
 Visualization Evaluation and Repair
 Visualization Recommendation
 Infographic Generation

Data Summarization
Datasets can be massive. AI Spreadsheets Visualization summarizes data into a compact but information dense natural language representation used as grounding context for all subsequent operations.

Automated Data Exploration
Unfamiliar with a dataset? AI Spreadsheets Visualization provides a fully automated mode that generates meaningful visualization goals based on the dataset. 

Grammar-Agnostic Visualizations
Want visualizations created in python in Altair, Matplotlib, Seaborn etc? How about R, C++ ? AI Spreadsheets Visualization is grammar agnostic i.e., can generate visualizations in any grammar represented as code.

Infographics Generation
Convert data into rich, embellished, engaging stylized infographics using image generation models. Think data stories, personalization (brand, style, marketing etc.)

➤ Privacy Policy 

By design, your data stays at all times on your Google account, never saved in our database. Your data aren’t shared with anyone, including the add-on owner. 
We complies with privacy laws (especially GDPR & California Privacy Act) to protect your data.
An automatic translation tool for Discord messages in over 100 languages (unofficial)

Discord Translator | Auto Discord Translator | Translator for Discord | Translate Discord Messages | Discord Chat Translator | Chrome Extension for Discord Translation | Real-time Translation for Discord | Language Translation for Discord | Translate Messages in Discord | Instant Chat Translator for Discord

Definition:
Discord Translator is your ultimate browser-based extension for translating messages on Discord Web. This auto Discord translator offers real-time translations of chats across public channels, private messages, and servers, helping you break language barriers in international communities. As a translator for Discord, it ensures smooth, multilingual communication for gamers, communities, and professionals alike. With support for 100+ languages, it’s a perfect language translation tool for Discord.

How to Use:
Add the Discord Translator extension from the Chrome Web Store.


Open Discord Web and join a server or direct message.


Choose your desired source and target languages.


The extension auto-translates messages or allows manual control.



Features:
✅ Auto Discord Translator: Instantly translates server and DM messages.
✅ Translator for Discord: Broad compatibility with channel and private chats.
✅ Translate Discord Messages: Translate in-channel content in real-time.
✅ Discord Chat Translator: Works directly on Discord Web with zero disruption.
✅ Chrome Extension for Discord Translation: Seamlessly embedded in the Discord UI.
✅ Real-time Translation for Discord: Eliminates delays in communication.
✅ Language Translation for Discord: Supports multilingual server interactions.
✅ Manual & Automatic Modes: Choose how and when messages are translated.
✅ Secure, Fast & Free: Local processing with no message logging.

Translate 50 Messages for Free - That’s Not It… Sign Up & Get 50 More!
Here's how to unlock your 100 free translations:
Install & Pin the Discord Translator extension from the Chrome Web Store.
Click the extension icon - you'll see a Sign-Up button.
Enter your email address, complete verification via code, and set your password.
That’s it - your account is ready with 50 bonus translations added instantly!
✅ Use your first 50 messages instantly - no login needed
✅ Create an account and unlock 50 additional translations for free
✅ Enjoy seamless, real-time translations across 100+ languages
Why wait? Break the language barrier - 100 messages at your fingertips now!
Start Translating in Seconds - No Cost, No Catch!

Why Choose Us?
✔ Ideal for gaming clans, DAOs, NFT projects, developer communities, and study groups.
✔ Effortlessly chat with global users in any language.
✔ Enhance communication, reduce confusion, and build inclusive spaces.
✔ No bots, no server-side dependency - works with your browser.
✔ Local translation only - your chats are never stored or shared.

Support:

Use realm to :

⚡ Instant Access Resources
Access curated lists instantly with a click. No need to toggle between multiple accounts or search Google. Quickly access all your email accounts from a single list.

🎉 How to Organize
---Workplaces: Set up distinct workplaces for different projects or teams.
---Widgets: Use folders and curated lists to streamline and categorize information efficiently.

⏳ Enhance Workflow Efficiency
Workflows, like flow states, need to be organized in the most efficient manner, similar to how your mind functions. With Realm, we provide tools that you can leverage to mimic your mental processes, allowing you to save and access information effortlessly.

With Realm, "read later" won’t become "read never." As hustlers, we save numerous information sources like ideas, mood boards, articles, tweets, etc. However, it's easy to lose track of where they are saved when needed. Realm lets you search content across all your realms and lists directly through a single search bar.

🤝 Collaboration and Sharing
Planning or working on something together and need to share information? Instead of saving lists across multiple platforms like Pinterest, Instagram, and Dribble, you can now combine all lists in one place and share them easily.

🧘‍♀️ Reduce Stress and Improve Focus
Scientific reports suggest that stress results from not acting on achievable tasks. Realm helps you identify your to-dos and pin them in a visible place, ensuring they remain in focus regardless of your mood.

📖 Resource hub of experts
Starting your expert journey takes time, mainly spent finding the right resources—tools, places, forums, and people to follow. Persistence follows. Realm bridges this gap by providing access to vetted, free content, boosting your knowledge to expert level from day one.

Use Monapo font and display ASCII Art correctly

Finally, a Chrome extension for reading ASCII art comfortably on the web.

MonapoFont converts the displayed font on a webpage to an ASCII-art-friendly font, so text art that normally looks broken or misaligned can render cleanly. It works on many websites, including Reddit, 4chan, Shitaraba BBS, 2ch/5chまとめ sites, and other pages where ASCII art or text art appears.

Open the extension from the Chrome toolbar, click convert, and the page font changes at once. You can also adjust the display to match the page and your reading preference.

Features:

- Convert webpage text to Monapo font
- Choose from bundled AA-friendly fonts
- Adjust text color
- Adjust font size
- Adjust line spacing
- Works across many websites with ASCII art or text art
- 8 free conversions included

Premium:
You can try 8 conversions for free. After that, Premium unlocks continued use.

Premium is available for:

- $1/month
- $5/year

Already using Premium in the AAみれるお / Monapo iOS app? Generate an activation code in the app and enter it in this Chrome extension to activate Premium here too.

ASCII art is part of a long-running online culture: fan stories, jokes, historical explainers, baseball threads, science lessons, food discussions, and many other works made by anonymous authors. MonapoFont helps make those pages readable again, even when the original layout looks like gibberish on a modern browser.

Click the extension, convert the font, tune the display, and enjoy ASCII art the way it was meant to be read.

Doc Edit Replay - AI Detector & Originality Checker for Google Docs
The ultimate revision history tool for Google Docs. Replay edits & use AI to verify originality and detect AI-written content.

Unlock the True Story Behind Every Google Doc with Revision History.

Ever wondered about the true creation process of a Google Doc? Go beyond the standard version history with Revision History, a powerful Chrome extension that provides a detailed, visual, and AI-powered analysis of any document's evolution. Our tool is designed to bring unparalleled transparency and integrity to your writing and review process.

Key Features:
🔹 Visual History Playback
Don't just read through changes—watch them happen. Revision History lets you replay the entire writing process like a video. See every keystroke, deletion, and paste in chronological order, giving you a clear and intuitive understanding of how the document was built from the ground up.

🔹 Advanced AI-Powered Analysis
Click the "Details" button to access our cutting-edge analysis dashboard. Our AI delves deep into the document's history to provide critical insights:
AI Writing Probability: In an age of AI-generated text, our tool assesses the likelihood that the content was written by an AI model, helping to ensure human authorship.
Natural Typing Analysis: We analyze the typing cadence and speed patterns to determine the probability that the document was typed at a normal, human pace.
Originality Probability: Get a confidence score on the document's originality, helping you identify potential plagiarism or heavy reliance on pasted content.
Intelligent Summary: Instantly generate a concise summary of the entire document, perfect for a quick overview.

🔹 Detailed Writing Metrics
Our integrated toolbar gives you at-a-glance data to understand the effort behind the words:
Writing Time: Track the total active time spent editing the document.
Sessions: See a complete breakdown of all individual editing sessions, including their duration and timing.
Pastes: Monitor the number and volume of paste events, a key indicator for assessing originality.
Seamlessly Integrated:
Revision History adds a clean and intuitive menu to your Google Docs interface without getting in the way. It feels like a native part of the Google Docs experience.

Who is Revision History For?
🔹Educators & Teachers: Uphold academic integrity by verifying that student work is original and authentically created. Easily detect potential use of AI writers or plagiarism.
🔹Students: Showcase your hard work and the integrity of your writing process. Provide proof of your original effort on important assignments.
🔹Editors & Publishers: Quickly assess the authenticity of submissions and ensure that the content you are reviewing is original.
🔹Collaborative Teams: Maintain transparency and accountability in shared documents. Understand who contributed what and how the document evolved over time.

Privacy Policy
Your data is never shared with anyone, including plugin owners. We strictly adhere to privacy laws, including GDPR and California Privacy Law, to protect your information. All uploaded data is automatically deleted every day.
Install Revision History today and bring a new level of clarity, trust, and integrity to your Google Docs workflow.
Take value from web and take json api updated

Take Data from Any Web Site and change into the JSON Format.

Transform any text element on the web into a dynamic JSON API with our easy-to-use Chrome extension. 'Dynamic Text Selector to JSON' enables users to effortlessly select text elements and convert them into a structured JSON format. Whether you're a developer, data enthusiast, or simply looking to extract and structure web content, our tool streamlines the process with precision. Experience a seamless web-to-JSON journey like never before

You have 3 options: 
Static: You can select a data, if you are certain that the data you will fetch wil always be in that area.
Table: You search for a value in a table in web site and retrieve corresponding table
Query: If the value not in a table and you are not certain that value place can be change, then you can create if condition. 

And finally you can take JSON API. If you want to use up to date, your chrome extension should be open.
